data.content: Shipment complete: merged feat/foolery-7a57 to main (merge commit 71d3849e), pushed to origin/main. CI green — lint, tests (2349 passed), build all succeeded. Files changed: agent-display-label.tsx (layout prop for stacked pills), settings-pools-section.tsx (restored flex layout with fixed widths), settings-pools-layout.test.ts (updated tests).
